official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound mount_screen_open packet fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound mount_screen_open packet body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and mount_screen_open packet id.
Official binary source for Play clientbound mount_screen_open framed packet encode and dispatch/decode.

field_notes.container_id: Small container id fixture accepted by FriendlyByteBuf.writeContainerId.
field_notes.entity_id: Primitive int fixture; does not prove mount entity existence.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound mount_screen_open packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive container/columns/entity id fixture only; do not infer mount entity existence, inventory/menu semantics, screen behavior, render readiness, or client-load completion.
